I am always happy to chat and connect! Feel free to reach out. Portfolio: ayushjadhav.com.

results.title: Senior AI/ML Engineer at Jobgether - United State | Visa Sponsorship Jobs
highlights:
# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Develop AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.
...
- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.
...
- Contribute to the design and implementation of modern AI architectures, including RAG systems, LLM integrations, and agent-based workflows.
...
- Develop frameworks for
...
- Translate complex machine learning and AI requirements into structured technical tasks and actionable development plans.
...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field (PhD preferred).
...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...
- Nice to have: experience in the utility, energy, or power sector and strong Databricks expertise.

results.title: Beemraj Bonthapally
highlights:
Cloud & Analytics Architect | AI/ML, IoT | Palantir Foundry | Data Strategy & Leadership
...
Principal AI and Data Architect at [Generac](https://www.linkedin.com/company/generac-power-systems)
...
I’m a Data, AI, and cloud professional who enjoys building analytics and AI solutions and leading teams to turn data into real business decisions. I’ve worked across analytics, AI/ML, IoT streaming, and cloud platforms, and I focus on creating secure, scalable systems that deliver real-time insights and decision intelligence, including solutions built on Palantir Foundry. I’ve helped modernize data platforms, build data lakes and warehouses, and connect AI/ML with streaming IoT data to drive meaningful outcomes. I enjoy working with cross-functional teams, setting good engineering practices, and making sure solutions are delivered on time, within budget, and aligned with business goals. I’m known for staying hands-on technically while also mentoring teams and helping shape the organization’s analytics journey.
...
### Principal AI and Data Architect at [Generac](https://www.linkedin.com/company/generac-power-systems) (Current)
...
Successfully led the migration of the enterprise data platform from legacy big data systems and SAP HANA to a modern cloud architecture on Snowflake on Azure Cloud. Partnered with cross-functional teams across IT, business units, and data engineering to transition 2,200+ ETL pipelines from Talend to Matillion and Azure Data Factory, supporting batch loads, CDC via Qlik Replicate, and real-time IoT streaming. Migrated Business Objects reports to Microsoft Power BI, enabling analytics across 11 business domains with 25+ workspaces. The Snowflake platform hosts 270+ GB of data and integrates CI/CD through Azure DevOps pipelines. Leveraged Azure Cloud resources for data pipelines, storage (ADLS Gen2), supplemental compute for ML inference workloads, Azure Key Vault for secrets management, and Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) for containerized application deployments. Collaborated with governance, security, and compliance teams to implement robust practices for data catalog on Atlan, master data, data quality, and observability dashboards. Delivered continuous cost optimization through FinOps dashboards, monitoring usage and negotiating licensing agreements with finance and procurement stakeholders. Worked closely with data science and ML teams to provide architectural guidance for exploratory analysis, machine learning pipelines, and MLOps. Designed and implemented the Battery Bot AI knowledge base chatbot to accelerate onboarding and provide engineering teams quick access to technical documents. Proposed AI design patterns for predictive analytics, forecasting, computer vision, and generative AI knowledge management. Partnered with operations and supply chain teams to architect and deploy solutions on Palantir Foundry, leveraging ontology modeling, pipeline builders, data lineage, and workshop app capabilities. Enabled dynamic scenario planning, unlocking $15–23M EBITDA improvements through fulfillment cost reduction and $10M in working capital optimization.
...

The Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI will apply knowledge and experience to real world problems and seek to utilize their skills reduce the cost of healthcare and improve health quality and outcomes. With access to dedicated on premise and cloud based big data solutions, the team can work with a vast amount of structured and unstructured data including claims, membership, physician demographics, medical records and others to begin to solve some of the most pressing healthcare issues of our time. A Data Scientist at Cotiviti will be given the opportunity to work directly with a team of healthcare professionals including analysts, clinicians, coding specialists, auditors and innovators to set aggressive goals and execute on them with the team. This is for an ambitious technologist, with the flexibility and personal drive to succeed in a dynamic environment where they are judged based on their direct impact to business outcomes.
...
- As a Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI within Cotiviti you will be responsible for delivering solutions that help our clients identify payment integrity issues, reduce the cost of healthcare processes, or improve the quality of healthcare outcomes. You will work as part of a team and will be individually responsible for the delivery of value associated with your projects. You will be expected to follow processes and practices that allow your models to be incorporated into our machine learning platform for production execution and monitoring, however, initial exploratory data analysis allows for more flexible experimentation to discover solutions to the business problems presented.

...

...
- Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team.
...
- Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform.
...
- Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption.
...

...
- Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets.
...

- Passion for collaboration, learn it all mindset and driving value with AI.
